primary_official_source.name: EUR-Lex — Official Journal of the European Union

published: NIST AI RMF 1.0 — AI Risk Management Framework
upcoming: CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard for Art. 9 (expected Q4 2026)

obligations.source_quote: A risk management system shall be established, implemented, documented and maintained in relation to high-risk AI systems.
obligations.addressee_note: Provider of a high-risk AI system (as defined in Art. 3(3))

decomposed_atoms.description: A risk management system must be established
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL establish a risk management system

decomposed_atoms.description: The RMS must be actively implemented
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The RMS SHALL be implemented — not just documented but actively executed

decomposed_atoms.description: The RMS must be documented
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The RMS SHALL be documented — creating traceable records

decomposed_atoms.description: The RMS must be maintained over time
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The RMS SHALL be maintained throughout the AI system's lifecycle

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for risk management documentation files (risk_assessment.md, risk_register.*, FMEA files)
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether the documented RMS is adequate and truly maintained
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect presence of documentation but cannot assess quality or maintenance

obligations.source_quote: The risk management system shall be understood as a continuous iterative process planned and run throughout the entire lifecycle of a high-risk AI system, requiring regular systematic review and updating.

decomposed_atoms.description: RMS must be continuous and iterative
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The RMS SHALL be continuous and iterative — not a one-time exercise

decomposed_atoms.description: RMS activities must be planned
decomposed_atoms.requirement: RMS activities SHALL be planned with defined schedules and responsibilities

decomposed_atoms.description: RMS must cover entire lifecycle
decomposed_atoms.requirement: RMS SHALL run throughout the entire lifecycle — design through decommission

decomposed_atoms.description: Regular systematic review required
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The RMS SHALL undergo regular systematic review and updating

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for version-controlled risk documents with change history, review schedules
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether the process is truly continuous and iterative
automation_assessment.rationale: Can check for version history but cannot verify genuine iteration

obligations.source_quote: the identification and analysis of the known and the reasonably foreseeable risks that the high-risk AI system can pose to health, safety or fundamental rights when the high-risk AI system is used in accordance with its intended purpose;

decomposed_atoms.description: Known risks must be identified
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL identify known risks to health, safety, or fundamental rights

decomposed_atoms.description: Foreseeable risks must be identified
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL identify reasonably foreseeable risks

decomposed_atoms.description: Identified risks must be analysed
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL analyse identified risks — assessing nature, severity, and likelihood

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for risk register with risk categories covering health, safety, fundamental rights
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether all foreseeable risks have been identified
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect presence of risk register but cannot assess completeness

obligations.source_quote: the estimation and evaluation of the risks that may emerge when the high-risk AI system is used in accordance with its intended purpose, and under conditions of reasonably foreseeable misuse;

decomposed_atoms.description: Risks from intended use must be evaluated
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Risk evaluation SHALL consider risks from intended use

decomposed_atoms.description: Risks from foreseeable misuse must be evaluated
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Risk evaluation SHALL consider risks from reasonably foreseeable misuse

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for intended use / misuse documentation, model cards
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether misuse scenarios are realistic and comprehensive
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect presence of documentation but cannot assess completeness

obligations.source_quote: the evaluation of other risks possibly arising, based on the analysis of data gathered from the post-market monitoring system referred to in Article 72;

decomposed_atoms.description: Risks from post-market data must be evaluated
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL evaluate risks arising from post-market monitoring data

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for post-market monitoring integration in risk management docs
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether post-market data is actually feeding into risk management
automation_assessment.rationale: Post-market monitoring feedback loop cannot be verified from code alone

obligations.source_quote: the adoption of appropriate and targeted risk management measures designed to address the risks identified pursuant to point (a).

decomposed_atoms.description: Risk management measures must be adopted
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL adopt appropriate and targeted risk management measures

decomposed_atoms.description: Measures must address identified risks
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Risk measures SHALL be designed to address the specific risks identified in step (a)

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for guardrails, safety checks, input validation, content filters in code
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether measures are appropriate and targeted to specific risks
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect risk mitigation code patterns but cannot assess appropriateness

obligations.source_quote: The risks referred to in this Article shall concern only those which may be reasonably mitigated or eliminated through the development or design of the high-risk AI system, or the provision of adequate technical information.
obligations.note: Scope-limiting clause: the RMS need only address risks that are reasonably mitigable through design or provision of technical information. Not all conceivable risks fall within scope.

decomposed_atoms.description: RMS scope is limited to reasonably mitigable risks
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The RMS SHALL concern only risks which may be reasonably mitigated or eliminated through design or provision of adequate technical information

automation_assessment.detection_method: N/A — scope-definition clause requiring legal judgment
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether identified risks fall within scope of what is reasonably mitigable through design or technical information
automation_assessment.rationale: Scope determination requires domain expertise and legal judgment — cannot be automated

obligations.source_quote: The risk management measures referred to in paragraph 2, point (d), shall give due consideration to the effects and possible interaction resulting from the combined application of the requirements set out in this Section, with a view to minimising risks more effectively while achieving an appropriate balance in implementing the measures to fulfil those requirements.

decomposed_atoms.description: Combined effects of requirements must be considered
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Risk measures SHALL consider effects from combined application of all Section requirements

decomposed_atoms.description: Balance must be achieved
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Measures SHALL achieve appropriate balance between risk minimisation and requirement fulfilment

automation_assessment.detection_method: N/A — requires human assessment of cross-requirement interactions
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether combined effects have been adequately considered
automation_assessment.rationale: Cross-requirement interaction analysis requires domain expertise

obligations.source_quote: The risk management measures referred to in paragraph 2, point (d), shall be such that the relevant residual risk associated with each hazard, as well as the overall residual risk of the high-risk AI systems is judged to be acceptable.

decomposed_atoms.description: Residual risk per hazard must be acceptable
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Each hazard's residual risk SHALL be judged acceptable

decomposed_atoms.description: Overall residual risk must be acceptable
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The overall residual risk SHALL be judged acceptable

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for residual risk documentation, known limitations sections
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether residual risks are truly acceptable
automation_assessment.rationale: Acceptability involves value judgments beyond technical assessment

obligations.source_quote: elimination or reduction of risks identified and evaluated pursuant to paragraph 2 in as far as technically feasible through adequate design and development of the high-risk AI system;

decomposed_atoms.description: Risks must be eliminated/reduced through design
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL eliminate or reduce risks through adequate design and development

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for safety-by-design patterns (guardrails, input validation, output filters)
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether design choices adequately address identified risks
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect safety patterns but cannot assess adequacy

obligations.source_quote: where appropriate, implementation of adequate mitigation and control measures addressing risks that cannot be eliminated;

decomposed_atoms.description: Mitigation measures for non-eliminable risks
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL implement adequate mitigation and control measures for risks that cannot be eliminated by design

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for monitoring, alerting, fallback mechanisms, circuit breakers
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether mitigations are adequate and proportionate
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect mitigation patterns but cannot assess proportionality

obligations.source_quote: provision of information required pursuant to Article 13 and, where appropriate, training to deployers.

decomposed_atoms.description: Information per Art. 13 must be provided
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL provide information required by Art. 13

decomposed_atoms.description: Training for deployers where appropriate
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL provide training to deployers where appropriate

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for deployer documentation and training materials
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether information and training are sufficient

cross_references.context: Transparency and provision of information to deployers

obligations.source_quote: With a view to eliminating or reducing risks related to the use of the high-risk AI system, due consideration shall be given to the technical knowledge, experience, education, the training to be expected by the deployer, and the presumable context in which the system is intended to be used.

decomposed_atoms.description: Deployer's technical knowledge must be considered
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Due consideration SHALL be given to the deployer's technical knowledge and experience

decomposed_atoms.description: Intended usage context must be considered
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Due consideration SHALL be given to the presumable context of use

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for target user documentation, deployment context description
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether deployer context has been adequately considered
automation_assessment.rationale: Deployer context assessment requires domain knowledge

obligations.source_quote: High-risk AI systems shall be tested for the purpose of identifying the most appropriate and targeted risk management measures. Testing shall ensure that high-risk AI systems perform consistently for their intended purpose and that they are in compliance with the requirements set out in this Section.

decomposed_atoms.description: Testing to identify appropriate risk measures
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Systems SHALL be tested to identify the most appropriate risk management measures

decomposed_atoms.description: Testing must verify consistent performance
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Testing SHALL ensure consistent performance for intended purpose

decomposed_atoms.description: Testing must verify Section compliance
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Testing SHALL ensure compliance with all requirements in this Section (Art. 8-15)

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for test files, evaluation scripts, benchmark files
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether tests adequately cover identified risks
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect testing infrastructure but cannot assess test adequacy

obligations.source_quote: The testing of high-risk AI systems shall be performed, as appropriate, at any time throughout the development process, and, in any event, prior to their being placed on the market or put into service.

decomposed_atoms.description: Testing throughout development
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Testing SHALL be performed at any time throughout development

decomposed_atoms.description: Testing before market placement
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Testing SHALL be performed prior to being placed on market or put into service

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for CI/CD test integration, pre-deployment test gates
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether testing was performed at appropriate times
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect CI/CD integration but cannot verify timing of all tests

obligations.source_quote: Testing shall be carried out against prior defined metrics and probabilistic thresholds that are appropriate to the intended purpose of the high-risk AI system.

decomposed_atoms.description: Metrics must be defined before testing
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Testing SHALL use prior defined metrics — not post-hoc cherry-picked

decomposed_atoms.description: Probabilistic thresholds required
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Testing SHALL use probabilistic thresholds — not binary pass/fail

decomposed_atoms.description: Metrics appropriate to purpose
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Metrics and thresholds SHALL be appropriate to the system's intended purpose

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for metric definitions (accuracy, precision, recall, F1, AUC), threshold values in config
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether metrics are appropriate for the specific system
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect metric usage but cannot assess appropriateness

obligations.source_quote: When implementing the risk management system as provided for in paragraphs 1 to 7, providers shall give consideration to whether in view of its intended purpose the high-risk AI system is likely to have an adverse impact on persons under the age of 18 and, as appropriate, other vulnerable groups.
obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies when the AI system is intended to be used by or may affect children or vulnerable groups

decomposed_atoms.description: Impact on children must be considered
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Providers SHALL consider whether the system is likely to adversely impact persons under 18

decomposed_atoms.description: Impact on vulnerable groups must be considered
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Providers SHALL consider impact on other vulnerable groups as appropriate

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for references to children, minors, age verification, child safety in code and docs
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether the system actually affects children and whether protections are adequate
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect references but cannot determine actual impact on children

obligations.source_quote: Testing procedures may include testing in real-world conditions in accordance with Article 60.
obligations.note: Permission to test in real-world conditions, subject to Art. 60 safeguards. Not an obligation.

decomposed_atoms.description: Real-world testing is permitted
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Providers MAY include real-world testing subject to Art. 60 requirements

obligations.source_quote: For providers of high-risk AI systems that are subject to requirements regarding internal risk management processes under other relevant provisions of Union law, the aspects provided in paragraphs 1 to 9 may be part of, or combined with, the risk management procedures established pursuant to that law.
obligations.note: Permission to integrate Art. 9 RMS with other Union law risk management. Not an obligation.

decomposed_atoms.description: RMS may integrate with other legal requirements
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The RMS MAY be part of or combined with risk management under other Union law

automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether integration with other risk management is appropriate

scope_notes.general_obligations: ART09-OBL-1 through ART09-OBL-8b — apply to ALL high-risk AI systems
scope_notes.conditional: ART09-OBL-9 — applies only when system may affect children or vulnerable groups
